Interface IBinFunction

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control a raster histogram bin function.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("07F78971-F990-11D2-80B0-00500462E955")]
public interface IBinFunction

Properties

NumBins

Number of bins (same as rows in table).

int NumBins { get; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

Methods

Invert(int, out double, out double)

Returns upper and lower limits of bin.

void Invert(int Bin, out double upper, out double lower)

Parameters

Bin int
upper double
lower double

Converts pixel values to columns in the descriptor table.
